getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.draftMasterPlanDesc: We are mapping out detailed land use plans for the next 10 to 15 years in the Draft Master Plan 2025. Join us in shaping our city.
getInvolved.architectureCollectionDesc: This exhibition explores five bold plans from the past 60 years—like the 1971 Concept Plan, the Central Area Structure Plan, and the Identity Plan - that have shaped our city.
getInvolved.williamLimIdea: To draw an Idea: retracing the designs of William Lim Associates – W Architects
getInvolved.williamLimIdeaDesc: Learn more about Singapore's architecture in the first showcase of the Singapore Architecture Collection, from William Lim Associates and W Architects

ideasTrends.title: Ideas and Trends
ideasTrends.artWestCoast: Art brings new life to West Coast Park
ideasTrends.designMuseums: How design museums can effect change in cities
ideasTrends.designMuseumsDesc: Design museums can inspire transformative changes in cities, shares Maria Nicanor, Director, Cooper Hewitt, Smithsonian Design Museum, reflecting on the role of museums and the power of design.
ideasTrends.sustainingHeritage: Sustaining our love for our built heritage
ideasTrends.sustainingHeritageDesc: NUS Professor Ho Puay Peng hopes for more public sharing of Singapore's built heritage and robust conservation management plans adopted for conservation projects.

articles.title: Art brings new life to West Coast Park
articles.description: Creative installations transform public spaces into vibrant community hubs.

articles.title: How design museums can effect change in cities
articles.description: Design museums inspire transformative changes in cities, reflecting on the role of museums and the power of design.

articles.title: Sustaining our love for our built heritage
articles.description: Professor Ho Puay Peng hopes for more public sharing of Singapore's built heritage and robust conservation management.

articles.title: Building blocks of a nation
articles.description: Expert insights on developing frameworks for economy, defense, housing and social fabric to guide heritage site assessment.

articles.title: Why ecological corridors are important for high-density cities
articles.description: New study shows how corridors enable biodiversity to flourish while people enjoy nature closer to homes.

articles.title: Identity Corridors spark new possibilities
articles.description: Residents envision new possibilities from Identity Corridors engagements - outdoor classrooms or activate back lanes.
